appDesc.message: Ho Ľiho Ľi ińĀ YouTube i kńĀna ho ĽolńĀlńĀ ma Ľamau (ma mua o nńĀ kihi poepoe a pau a me nńĀ makemake  Ľole huna) + ho Ľohuli hou i nńĀ YouTube Shorts + ńĀlai i nńĀ ho Ľolaha ki Ľi li Ľili Ľi

mode_restoreDislikes.message: Ho Ľiho Ľi i nńĀ mea makemake  Ľole

mode_playablesBlock.message: HŇęnńĀ i nńĀ mea pńĀ Ľani

mode_reduceAnimations.message: E hŇć Ľemi i nńĀ ki Ľi Ľoni Ľoni

mode_idlePrevention.message: KńĀohi  Ľana i ka hana  Ľole

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: HŇć Ľike i nńĀ helu makemake  Ľole me ka ho Ľohana  Ľana i ka  Ľikepili Ho Ľiho Ľi  Ľole YouTube

helptip_unroundCorners.message: NńĀ kihi  Ľole a puni nńĀ mea UI

helptip_disableShorts.message: E ho Ľohuli i nńĀ Shorts i ka mea pńĀ Ľani ńĀkea ma Ľamau

helptip_shortsBlock.message: HŇęnńĀ i nńĀ pŇćkole mai ka  Ľike  Ľia  Ľana ma ka  Ľao Ľao home + nńĀ hualoa Ľa

helptip_playablesBlock.message: HŇęnńĀ i nńĀ mea hiki ke pńĀ Ľani  Ľia mai ka  Ľike  Ľia  Ľana ma ka  Ľao Ľao home

helptip_adBlock.message: HŇęnńĀ i nńĀ ki Ľi li Ľili Ľi o ka ho Ľolaha mai nńĀ ho Ľonohonoho  Ľao Ľao home

helptip_aiBlock.message: HŇęnńĀ i nńĀ mea AI mai ka home + nńĀ  Ľao Ľao wikiŇć

helptip_reduceAnimations.message: E hŇć Ľemi i nńĀ ki Ľi Ľoni Ľoni UI

helptip_idlePrevention.message: E pale i ka hiamoe  Ľana o ka pńĀ

helptip_notifDisabled.message: HŇć Ľike i nńĀ leka ho Ľomaopopo i ka wńĀ e ho Ľololi ai i ke  Ľano/nńĀ ho Ľonohonoho
